meta.title: Jorge Arce — Restore Function. Restore Lives. · v22 Sacred
meta.description: Careful surgery for the most precious function a person has. Dr. Jorge Arce — oral & maxillofacial surgery, South Bay.

sections.title: Restore Function. Restore Lives.
sections.sub: careful surgery for the most precious function a person has

items.line: I return the bite, the smile, the voice.
I take the cases others turn away.

sections.big: Dr. Jorge Arce is a Colombia-born, California-forged oral & maxillofacial surgeon at the forefront of an old yet radical way to practice: unhurried surgical care. Twenty-seven years. One discipline. Every case given the time it actually needs.
sections.fn: not the pace one would normally expect from modern medicine — and exactly the point.
cols: He grew up in Colombia, in a family that treated careful work as a form of respect. Medicine was not a career choice so much as a calling — a way to use his hands to give something back. He moved to California to specialize, and never left.

Board certified in implantology, he believes in direct action and plain language: honest diagnosis, meticulous planning, and surgery done once, done right. In 2007 he founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay.

steps.title:
Map out the territory.*
Identify what can be saved.
steps.fn: * every case begins with imaging, history, and an honest read — in plain language.

steps.title: Then highlight what we must reclaim and rebuild to protect function and quality of life.
steps.fn: bone loss, failing teeth, and past work that never held — nothing is judged, everything is mapped.

steps.title: Partnering with patients* to restore territory and give it back — for good:

steps.p: Diagnose fully — imaging, history, honest candidacy, in plain language.
Plan the whole case before anyone operates — implants, grafting, sequencing.
Restore & maintain for life — full-arch All-On-X down to a single implant.

partners.t: * joining the restoration party with the best of them:

link.t: Want to learn how far the work has already come?

cells.l: Founder, Dental Implants Center of South Bay

cards.q: “I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.”
“The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.”
“When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make.”
cards.who: dr. david kim, d.d.s. — referring dentist, torrance

sections.mission: Restoring the most precious function a person has — together with the people who trust us.
sections.legal: Jorge Arce — restore function · restore lives — © dr. jorge arce, d.d.s.
